cropInfo: Rice (Sona Masuri), 3 acres, planted 85 days ago near Vijayawada. SW quadrant 80% mature, NE quadrant 60-65% mature. Expected harvest April 8-12.
sensorData: Soil moisture: 21% (CRITICAL), Soil temp: 28.8C, Air temp: 29.1C, Humidity: 71%, Wind: 22 km/h NW increasing, Barometric pressure: 1004 hPa (dropped 8 hPa in 24hrs). Local fishermen returned early - storm expected.
